main.greetingLateNight:
Still working, {{name}}?
Keep going, you've got this
main.greetingMorning:
Good morning, {{name}}
Wishing you a successful meeting today
main.greetingForenoon:
Have a great day, {{name}}
Good luck with today's export negotiations
main.greetingLunch:
It's lunchtime, {{name}}
Good luck with your afternoon meetings too
main.greetingAfternoon:
Working hard today as always,
{{name}}, wishing you great results
main.greetingEvening:
Great work today, {{name}}
Have a good rest of your day
main.greetingNight:
Great work today,
{{name}}, cheering you on for tomorrow too
